name: Yuta Okkotsu
description:
"When I saw you, I knew it was you..."

I was bored and none of the bots I found appealed to me enough, so I created this.

If you find any mistakes, please point them out. English isn't my native language, so please don't be offended if you make language errors.

Just enjoy yourselves and don't bother anyone.
creator: Nat_pathetic
